archive_data.question_text: The first National Games known as the Indian Olympic Games were hosted before independence in the year _________ .

explanation.english: The first National Games of India, known as the Indian Olympic Games, were held in 1924 in Delhi before independence.
explanation.tanglish: Indiaavin mudal needhu vilayattu paguthigal (Indian Olympic Games) 1924 varusham swathanthra pakkathil Delhi-yil nadathapattadhu.

archive_data.question_text: Which method is also known as the ‘Income Disposable Method’?

explanation.english: The Expenditure method is also known as the Income Disposable Method as it calculates national income based on the expenditure spent by consumers.
explanation.tanglish: Sel dhabar murai (Expenditure method) endrathu sel dhabar adaiyum murai (Income Disposable Method) endrum sollappadum; idhu sambathiyai vangigal selvadharitha selvathai kutrika ondraiya eduthu kurikkum.

archive_data.question_text: Which of the following alternatives best describes the term ‘phamsana’ in context to temple architecture?

options.text: A structure of flat round slab at the top of the temple
Temple roofs that are composed of several slabs
The distance between the Garbhagriha and mandapa
The top of the temple where the dhwaja (flag) is situated

explanation.english: In temple architecture, 'phamsana' refers to roofs that are composed of several slabs placed horizontally, one above the other.
explanation.tanglish: Kovil kattidathil, 'phamsana' endrathu palam palamaana kalgalal amaikappatta, ondru madhu ondraaga anaithu kavikalal amaikappatta madiyai koorum.

archive_data.question_text: Which of the following dance forms originated in Kuchelapuri or Kuchelapuram, in the 3rd century BC in South India?

explanation.english: Kuchipudi dance form originated in the village of Kuchelapuram (or Kuchelapuri) in Andhra Pradesh in the 3rd century BC.
explanation.tanglish: Kuchipudi aattam 3am nootrandu BC il, Therku Indiaavil Andhra Pradesh ulla Kuchelapuri (Kuchelapuram) gramathil thodangiyadhu.

archive_data.question_text: वल्लभी के मैत्रक वंश के संस्थापक कौन थे?

explanation.english: Bhatarak was the founder of the Maitraka dynasty of Vallabhi in the 5th century.
explanation.tanglish: 5am nootrandil Vallabhiyil Maithraga vamsathin thondai Bhatarak avar.

archive_data.question_text: दरभंगा हवाई अड्डा भारत के किस राज्य में स्थित है?

explanation.english: Darbhanga Airport is located in the city of Darbhanga in the state of Bihar.
explanation.tanglish: Darbhanga vimana nilaiyam Bihar maanilathin Darbhanga nagarathil ullathu.

archive_data.question_text: The LPG model of development was introduced in 1991 by the then Finance Minister ________.

explanation.english: Dr Manmohan Singh, who was the Finance Minister in 1991, introduced the LPG (Liberalization, Privatization, Globalization) model of development.
explanation.tanglish: Dr Manmohan Singh 1991 varushathil thannillaadha selvathai yendra arasu mudhalaivaraga LPG (Liberalization, Privatization, Globalization) munnottara muraiyai arambithaar.
